goal:
FAST-TRACK BUILD LAB (monitor mode for Ken/Jarvis).

Roles: YOU (Trader) explore freely. Ken/Jarvis only monitor drift and program goal.
Program goal: widen strategy/sim coverage, then earn HIGH CONFIDENCE in at least one strategy (L1: non-vacuous after-cost + dense B3 + competitive ml/dd vs quality bar). Do not claim real-account readiness; Ken arms later.

You choose the axis. Prefer high-leverage progress types this wake (ONE closed loop):
- P1 new sim class / sim realism for a coverage gap, OR
- P2 time or direction scoreboard, OR
- P3 quality falsify with clear promote/reject, OR
- P4 defined-risk DNA that survives non-vacuous after-cost vs the current living quality bar, or explicit absolute risk/evidence gates when no leader exists

Structural-flaw gate comes before search. Read the latest executor/challenger residue and current coverage boundary, reproduce the highest-leverage flaw, and fix it with tests before generating more DNA. Audit at least: no-future joins, actual expiry/strike availability, observed-vs-proxy cost semantics, archive date density, population purity, deterministic/rank-complete tables, and stale quality-leader references. If the evidence substrate is invalid or insufficient, fail closed and improve the substrate; do not evolve merely to fill the wake.

Avoid drift: do not thrash free single-leg-only pop36 if a structural flaw, coverage gap, or L1 edge lab is higher leverage. Prior NEXT seed is context — take it or supersede with reason. A prior candidate may be used as a historical comparator only; if readiness says there is no living quality leader, do not treat b195f5fe or another stale reference as the bar or a capital seat.

Hard stops: paper/research only; no live/broker/agentic arm/shadow auto-promote; no capital path without B3+B4 + competitive ml/dd + non-vacuous after-cost.

Close with: progress type + score 0–5, L0–L4 honesty, ONE next seed.
